description: remuxing often fixes compatibility issues with old software. it's fast, lossless, and everything is processed on-device.

seo.title: video converter & audio extractor
seo.description: extract audio from video files and convert video formats like avi to mp4 directly in your browser. local processing, no upload.
seo.keywords: video converter, audio extractor, avi to mp4, extract audio from video, browser ffmpeg, local video processing

tips.local_only: files are processed locally in your browser and are not uploaded to the server.

empty.no_files: no files in queue yet. drop one or more files to begin.

errors.out_of_memory: browser ran out of memory. try a smaller file or close other tabs.
errors.no_audio_stream: this file has no audio stream to extract.
errors.no_video_stream: this file has no video stream to convert.
errors.no_storage: this browser cannot provide temporary storage for local processing.
errors.generic: processing failed. try another format or switch to compatible mode.
